findings.evidence: New file lines 84-92 and 118-121 use `rfl`; Mathlib exposes stable facts at `Mathlib/RingTheory/Bialgebra/TensorProduct.lean:77` (`map_tmul`) and `:86` (`map_toAlgHom`).
findings.fix: Prove these via the corresponding Mathlib lemmas, e.g. `Bialgebra.TensorProduct.map_tmul` and `Bialgebra.TensorProduct.map_toAlgHom`, with `simp [map, includeRight]` only to unfold the local names.
findings.issue: `map_tmul`, `map_includeRight`, and `map_toAlgHom` are proved by `rfl`, relying on the current definitional shape of `Bialgebra.TensorProduct.map` and coercions through the local `map` abbrev.

summary: The proofs are mostly short, but several public wrapper lemmas rely on definitional equality through Mathlib tensor-product internals instead of the stable lemmas Mathlib already exposes.
